approval.source: Explicit user instruction in the Archer Neutral Master Exact-File Approval v1 task.
scope: future derivative source subject to separate derivative validation and approval
exclusions: Idle, Move, or Attack package approval
portrait, class icon, card UI, or other derivative approval
permission to alter the approved identity

identityLock.face: large-eyed approachable heroic female Ranger face from the exact approved pixels
identityLock.eyes: large expressive green eyes with preserved shape, spacing, and contrast
identityLock.hood: green Ranger hood with gold trim and an open face read
identityLock.hair: green hair with the approved front and side silhouette
identityLock.ears: pointed elf-like ears with approved size, angle, and placement
identityLock.bodyProportions: approximately 2.5 to 3 heads tall, large head, compact torso, short readable limbs
identityLock.costume: approved green-and-gold Ranger costume language and detail hierarchy
identityLock.palette: dominant green, warm gold, natural skin, and dark leather support
identityLock.bow: approved ornate green-and-gold bow identity, scale, curvature, grip, string relationship, and gold tips
identityLock.silhouette: approved hood, ears, hair, compact body, quiver, cape, and oversized-bow silhouette
identityLock.renderingLanguage: cute stylized 3D fantasy chibi with gameplay-first readability and polished mobile-game finish
identityLock.futureContinuityRule: Idle, Move, Attack, and presentation derivatives must derive from this exact master and may not materially change face identity, hair color, hood design, bow identity, costume language, or body-proportion class without a new approval.

board: preserve foreground separation from Arena Ruins warm sand and stone
bench: bench is the highest readability risk
prevent hood and hair from collapsing into one undifferentiated green mass
shop: do not excessively crop feet or the lower bow
carriedForwardConstraints.geometryRule: Do not change board, tile, camera, bench-slot, anchor, or gameplay geometry to compensate for a visual-readability issue.

orderedSequence: Archer Idle Production v1 and separate approval
Archer Move Production v1 and separate approval
Archer Attack Production v1 and separate approval
futureProductionGate.derivativePolicy: Every motion or presentation derivative requires its own provenance, continuity validation, and approval. Neutral Master approval does not approve a derivative automatically.
